form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing second after being driven well back, behind Kualight at Shepparton over 2190m in a NR up to 49 on March 24 at $8. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Mussel Shoals at Echuca over 2160m in a NR 45 to 50 on April 5 at $1.80. In the mix from the inside draw.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Eastbro Jesse at Shepparton over 1690m in a NR 43 to 48 on February 24 at $15. Then a handy effort when a close second after showing early speed, behind Just Pedro at Ballarat over 2200m in a NR 45 to 50 on March 5 at $15. Plenty to like about his prospects.

Big run expected.
